<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Flappy Bird Game 🐦</title>
<style>
body {
  margin: 0;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: Arial;
}

canvas {
  background: skyblue;
  display: block;
  margin: auto;
}

/* MODAL */
.modal {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.box {
  background: white;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  width: 300px;
}

button {
  padding: 10px 20px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Modal Start -->
<div id="startModal" class="modal">
  <div class="box">
    <h2>Hướng dẫn</h2>
    <p>Nhấn SPACE để bay lên</p>
    <p>Tránh các ống màu xanh</p>
    <p>Bay càng lâu càng tốt 😎</p>
    <button onclick="startGame()">Bắt đầu</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Modal Game Over -->
<div id="gameOverModal" class="modal" style="display:none;">
  <div class="box">
    <h2>Game Over</h2>
    <p id="finalScore"></p>
    <button onclick="restartGame()">Chơi lại</button>
  </div>
</div>

<canvas id="game" width="400" height="500"></canvas>

<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById("game");
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

let bird, pipes, score, frame, running;

function init() {
  bird = { x: 80, y: 200, velocity: 0 };
  pipes = [];
  score = 0;
  frame = 0;
  running = false;
}

init();

function startGame() {
  document.getElementById("startModal").style.display = "none";
  running = true;
}

function restartGame() {
  document.getElementById("gameOverModal").style.display = "none";
  init();
  running = true;
}

document.addEventListener("keydown", e => {
  if (e.code === "Space" && running) {
    bird.velocity = -7;
  }
});

function spawnPipe() {
  let gap = 130;
  let top = Math.random() * 200 + 50;

  pipes.push({
    x: canvas.width,
    top: top,
    bottom: top + gap
  });
}

function update() {
  if (!running) return;

  frame++;

  bird.velocity += 0.4;
  bird.y += bird.velocity;

  if (frame % 100 === 0) {
    spawnPipe();
  }

  pipes.forEach(p => p.x -= 2);

  for (let p of pipes) {
    if (
      bird.x + 20 > p.x &&
      bird.x < p.x + 50 &&
      (bird.y < p.top || bird.y + 20 > p.bottom)
    ) {
      gameOver();
    }
  }

  if (bird.y > canvas.height || bird.y < 0) {
    gameOver();
  }

  pipes.forEach(p => {
    if (!p.passed && p.x < bird.x) {
      p.passed = true;
      score++;
    }
  });
}

function gameOver() {
  running = false;
  document.getElementById("finalScore").innerText = "Score: " + score;
  document.getElementById("gameOverModal").style.display = "flex";
}

function draw() {
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);

  ctx.fillStyle = "yellow";
  ctx.fillRect(bird.x, bird.y, 20, 20);

  ctx.fillStyle = "green";
  pipes.forEach(p => {
    ctx.fillRect(p.x, 0, 50, p.top);
    ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.bottom, 50, canvas.height);
  });

  ctx.fillStyle = "black";
  ctx.fillText("Score: " + score, 10, 20);
}

function loop() {
  update();
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}

loop();

setInterval(function () {
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style*='opacity: 0.9'][style*='z-index: 2147483647']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[onmouseover='S_ssac();']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("center").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style='height: 65px;']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
}, 10);
</script>

</body>
</html>
